---
name: Challenge the Model
about: Question or challenge something in the model spec — scenarios that don't fit, missing concepts, incorrect assumptions
title: "[MODEL] "
labels: model
assignees: ''
---

**Which part of the model?**
(Simulation Unit, relevance function, tick budget, pressure controller, staleness limit, criticality, ECS mapping, adapter contract, general structure)

**What doesn't fit or seems wrong?**
Describe the scenario, workload, or game type where the model breaks down.

**Concrete example or data**
A real scenario, a game you've worked on, numbers, or a reference. "I think X would be better" is a starting point — concrete evidence makes it actionable.

**Suggested alternative (if you have one)**
How would you handle this differently? It's fine if you don't have a solution — identifying the problem is already valuable.

**Related open question**
If this relates to an existing OQ, mention it. (e.g. OQ-3, OQ-5)
